message: WINNER! You have won a free vacation. Reply YES to claim now.

message: Hi Alex, are we still meeting at 18:30 near the station?

message: URGENT: Your bank account is blocked. Follow the link immediately.

message: Please review the draft and send comments before tomorrow morning.

message: Congratulations! You were selected for a cash prize. Call now.
reasoning: The message is clearly asking the recipient to call, which is a common practice in SMS spam.

message: Mom, I bought bread and milk. I will be home in 20 minutes.

message: Limited offer only today: get a cheap loan with no documents required.

message: The lesson has been moved from Friday to Saturday at 10:00.

message: Claim your bonus points before they expire. Click the link.

message: I left the charger on your desk. Take it when you arrive.
